content.en:
Knowing the key to attacking the Supreme Ancestor, Ye Tian began to comprehend the rules of the Holy Domain in the Haitian Holy Sect.

For him, the rules of this strange sacred realm are very different from those of the Dark Forbidden Land, and the comprehension of this body is not as good as the ontology, and there is no way to use the ability of evolution to comprehend the rules, so he can only rely on himself.

Therefore, it would be very difficult for Ye Tian to create an ancestral method that belonged to the Holy Domain.

On top of that, it's too difficult for the two worlds to connect.

Ye Tian currently has no way to contact the replication body, so it is not clear when he will be able to create an Ancestor Method.

Sanctuary, the Holy Sect of the Sea and Sky.

In the blink of an eye, several realm years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's copied body had already been integrated into the Haitian Holy Sect as He Yuan, and no holy beast would suspect him, and he would hardly be exposed again.

In addition, Ye Tian could occasionally obtain some incomplete holy laws from the Haitian Holy Sect.

The Holy Law is similar to the Ancestral Law of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and only by fusing the Holy Law can one become a Holy Beast.

Ye Tian couldn't fuse the Holy Law, but he could learn from the Holy Law to understand and master the rules of this heaven and earth, which would be of great help to him in creating the Ancestral Law.

With the status of Ye Tian's body, it is not difficult to get some broken holy laws, and even some holy laws can be done.

Unlike the Dark Forbidden Realm, there are many holy spells in the Sacred Realm, and although they are still very precious, they are not difficult to obtain.

Because the holy beasts of the Dark Sanctuary often fall and die, there are many masterless holy laws.

In addition, some supreme holy beasts can also create other holy laws, enriching the number of holy laws in the holy realm.

Therefore, there are many holy dharmas here, and the difficulty of obtaining them is naturally very low.

It's a pity that the holy law here is not suitable for the human race, otherwise Ye Tiandu is ready to return to the human race with a batch of holy laws and create a group of ancestors.

Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian's body could not progress, so he could only continue to create the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and occasionally create the Ancestral Method.

He walked the Endless Ancestor Path, so it was possible to create a single Ancestor Method, although they had created some before, but some Dao had not been created, after all, the Endless Ancestor extended many Dao.

Theoretically, he could create an infinite number of ancestral methods.

Of course, it's faster and harder.

Perhaps at the beginning, he could create some Ancestral Methods, but later on, it became more and more difficult, and it even took countless realm years to create an Ancestral Method.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred realm years have passed, and Ye Tian has created three ancestral methods, which are placed in the human race temple, and only the unsurpassed domain ancestors who have made a very large contribution are eligible to exchange them, so as to merge into the ancestors.

After that, another hundred realm years had passed, and Ye Tiancai had created an Ancestor Method, which was obviously much more difficult to create than before.

In the back, Ye Tian needed hundreds of realm years to create an Ancestor Method.

Realm years passed, and before I knew it, the First Realm Era of the Third Dark Calendar had passed.

The first realm year is 120,000 realm years, and Ye Tian is equivalent to 120,000 realm years of penance, but the total number of ancestral methods created is only twenty-three, and now I am afraid that it will take one or even several realm epochs to create an ancestral law.

Several more realm eras have passed, and although Ye Tian has created some more Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, his overall strength has not improved much, but the strength of the human race has improved a lot, and now he has become the number one force in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

In terms of the number of ancestors alone, the Terran Race has now exceeded double digits, which is naturally thanks to those Ancestor Methods created by Ye Tian, which has increased the number of Terran Ancestors a lot, and there are currently thirteen Ancestors.

This is still because Ye Tian did not give the Ancestor Law casually, and he must have a great contribution to exchange the Ancestor Law, otherwise the Ancestor of the Human Race will inevitably exceed twenty.

In addition, under Ye Tian's cultivation, Ye Tian's wife, son, daughter, and sister all stepped into the realm of elite ancestors, and they were only one step away from the top ancestors.

If the Replica Body brought enough resources from the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, it would be enough to advance their strength to the top Ancestor combat power.

......

Haitian Holy Sect.

Ye Tian's copied body is still cultivating and contemplating the creation of the Ancestor Method, but unfortunately the ontology is not here, and the difficulty of creation has increased countless times, so he has not yet created an Ancestor Method.

In fact, if he had created an ordinary ancestral dharma, he might have succeeded in creating it.

However, what Ye Tian wanted to create was an Endless Ancestor Law that was in line with the rules of the Holy Domain, so it was very difficult to create.

He also followed a path similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain, starting with the creation of basic ancestral methods such as gold, wood, water, fire, earth, time and space, and then combining many ancestral methods to create endless ancestral methods.

And now, after a few realm eras, he still hasn't created an Ancestor Method, but it's almost the same as actually creating it.

What he is creating now is a Golden Ancestor Method, and this Ancestor Method is not ordinary, and it is definitely at the top level among the Ancestor Methods.

Unlike the Golden Ancestor Method of the Dark Forbidden Domain, this Ancestor Method was completely suitable for the Holy Domain, but Ye Tian was also extremely suitable for the Essence according to the body's body structure and cultivation path, but it was impossible to fit perfectly.

After all, the main body is a creature of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and this is the Ancestral Law transformed by the rules of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, so naturally it cannot fit perfectly.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body laughed loudly, just because the Golden Ancestor Law was successfully created, this was a good start.

"It took five realm epochs to create one Ancestor Method, and twelve Ancestor Laws to be created, sixty realm epochs definitely can't do it, but one Dark Calendar time can definitely do it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered a long period of penance again, and almost ignored the affairs of the outside world.

There were even some holy beasts that invited Ye Tian to go to some treasure places or ruins to hunt for treasures, but Ye Tian also refused them all.

After all, it was not easy for his copy body to enter the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and there would not be such a good opportunity next time, so this copy body must not fall, as long as there is the slightest danger of something, he will not do it.

One realm year after another has passed, and in the blink of an eye, 107 realm epochs have passed since the last birth of the Dark Soul Domain, which is equivalent to more than 10 million realm years in the past, what a long time this is.

And in such a long period of time, Ye Tian not only created the twelve basic ancestor methods of the holy realm heaven and earth, but also created the endless ancestor method that fits the holy realm heaven and earth according to the fusion of the twelve basic ancestor methods.

In other words, Ye Tian's first goal was accomplished.

"First apply to enter the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land to guard for a period of time, and when my copy body enters the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, I can connect with the body and share memories and information, and then the body will also get the Endless Ancestor Law of the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth, and then send the Sacred Heaven and Earth resources accumulated by the copy body over the long years to the body, and then the body can impact the Supreme Ancestor Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he applied to the two supreme holy beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Land to enter the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land.

Many holy beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect often entered the Haitian Forbidden Land to inspect the situation, so Ye Tian's application was naturally answered affirmatively quickly, of course, it was not a permanent guard, but a return after a period of inspection.

But for Ye Tian, that's enough!
